subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath ordained for His loved ones that which none but He hath perceived. To this the Dawning-Place of Revelation beareth witness, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی قدر لاحبائه ما لااطلع به الا هو یشهد بذلک مشرق الوحی ولکن الناس
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
